# Damoctocog Alfa Pegol 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Damoctocog Alfa Pegol 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Damoctocog Alfa Pegol</strong> 目前有 <strong>20 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Damoctocog Alfa Pegol 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment and prophylaxis of bleeding in previously treated patients (PTPs) ≥ 7 years of age with haemophilia A (congenital factor VIII deficiency).</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>primary release disorder of platelets（97.7%）</li>
<li>Glanzmann thrombasthenia（97.6%）</li>
<li>pseudo-von Willebrand disease（96.8%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（95.1%）</li>
<li>hemorrhagic disorder due to a constitutional thrombocytopenia（93.5%）</li>
<li>bleeding diathesis due to a collagen receptor defect（93.2%）</li>
<li>tumor of testis and paratestis（93.0%）</li>
<li>bronchial adenomas/carcinoids childhood（92.9%）</li>
<li>non-seminomatous lesion（92.9%）</li>
<li>ductal or ductular proliferation（92.9%）</li>
<li>chondroid hamartoma（92.9%）</li>
<li>progressive multiple sclerosis（92.9%）</li>
<li>thyroglossal duct cyst（92.7%）</li>
<li>cervical neuroblastoma（92.7%）</li>
<li>mesenchymoma（92.7%）</li>
<li>cystic neoplasm（92.7%）</li>
<li>epiglottis neoplasm（92.7%）</li>
<li>schwannoma of jugular foramen（92.6%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of floor of mouth（92.6%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of tongue（92.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/damoctocog-alfa-pegol/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
